name: instagram-viral-posts
description: Resolve a keyword to a hashtag, pull hashtag media from Instagram web endpoints, and return posts ranked by engagement.

inputs.name: keyword
inputs.note: Search term resolved to a hashtag.

pagination.note: Hashtag endpoint returns a bounded top/recent set; related hashtags can extend coverage.

verification_result: 10 posts returned and ranked by likes + comments; CSV export validated from output.json.
known_risks: Instagram private web endpoints are undocumented and may change.
Login may trigger checkpoints or rate limits.
Keyword search is approximated through hashtag resolution.
Follower enrichment requires extra per-author requests and should be opt-in.
